user_prompt: The bike squadron needs a cooling
prayer:
Approach the bike squadron with vials of sacred coolant, beseeching the Omnissiah's chill breath.
Invoke the rite of cooling upon the bike squadron's fervent engines, purging excess thermal fury.
Anoint the radiators with blessed unguents whilst chanting the Canticle of Thermal Equilibrium.
Commune with the Machine Spirits of the bike squadron, ensuring harmonious cooling flows.
Verify the rite through auspex scans, praising the Omnissiah's merciful frost.

Kneel before the mechanical lock in reverent diagnostic vigil, invoking the Omnissiah's discerning gaze.
Initiate diagnostics upon the mechanical lock's tumblers and wards, scanning for spiritual corruptions.
Chant the Binary Litany of Inspection, beseeching the Machine Spirit's truthful revelation.
Purify anomalous cogitations within the mechanical lock with sacred incense.
Conclude diagnostics affirming the mechanical lock's sanctified integrity under the God-Machine's will.

user_prompt: The star chart awaits a targeting
prayer:

Engage the targeting protocols upon the star chart, aligning celestial vectors with divine calculus.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the star chart to guide auspex reticules unerringly.
Anoint the holographic projectors whilst reciting the Canticle of Orbital Dominion.
Seal the targeting rite, affirming the star chart's alignment to the Omnissiah's cosmic machine.

user_prompt: Can you guide lascannon a shutdown?

Seal the focusing arrays with wards of incense, reciting the Canticle of Ceased Thunder.
Confirm shutdown integrity, praising the lascannon's obedient rest under the Machine God's will.

Perform consecration upon the bolter's sacred mechanisms, infusing bolts with holy promethium.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the bolter to awaken in righteous fury.
Anoint the firing chamber whilst chanting the Litany of Explosive Purification.
Affirm the bolter's consecration, ready for the Omnissiah's endless crusade.

Validate recalibration through test transmissions, glorifying the signal relay's restored clarity.
